decisions.summary: Clean-branch/split recommendation resolved: keeping this Story on a single branch/PR is correct. All 3 commits are the Story's own implementation, its own focused/integration/e2e verification, and its own spec/story doc updates for the same acceptance criteria (RML-S-1..6 / RML-CONTRACT-001..005); splitting would separate the contract from the tests that prove it.
decisions.reason: Verified via git log --oneline and git diff --stat origin/main...HEAD that no unrelated files or other stories are present on this branch.

decisions.summary: Bundled scope is intentional and Story-scoped: all 3 commits (feat ledger promotion wiring, docs marking acceptance criteria implemented, test+spec threat-model diagram addition) implement and verify the single Story story-vibepro-roi-measurement-loop-closure end-to-end (src/merge-manager.js promotion wiring, src/usage-report.js --gate-roi read path, src/gate-outcome-ledger.js central ledger model, plus focused/integration/e2e tests and the spec/story docs for the same contracts RML-CONTRACT-001..005). Splitting would separate a contract from its own verification evidence.
decisions.reason: 3 commits on this branch are all part of the same Story implementation + its own tests/docs; no unrelated changes are bundled. Confirmed via git log and git diff --stat against origin/main.
